actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The ground floor is the strongest and the rest of the floors are like the details of the theory.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The windows of the building let light in just like how a theory can shine light on new ideas and perspectives.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Theories that are grand are like skyscrapers that need to be rooted in a solid foundation.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If a theory crumbles like an old building, then it just means there must have been holes somewhere on the supporting levels.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Buildings, like theories, need inspection from time to time to make sure things are safe and running smoothly.
